body:
Following up on our earlier exchange about the [Aether Grid](companies/aether-grid) deal — I wanted to share that Khosla is moving forward with a term sheet at the seed stage, and we'd love to have [Halfway Capital](firms/halfway-capital) co-lead if you're still interested. The founders impressed us most on the hardware-software integration angle, which I know sits squarely in your climate infrastructure thesis. We're targeting a close by mid-February, so timing is a bit tight, but I think it's workable if we align on valuation this week. Would you have bandwidth for a call Thursday or Friday to sync on terms? Let me know what works on your end.

— Tomoko
